title: Inventory Management
description: Build a customizable inventory management system with AI and NocoBase. Connect coding agents like Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, or OpenCode to NocoBase and use natural language to generate products, SKUs, inbound/outbound records, warehouse locations, low-stock alerts, and inventory dashboards — not just a prototype, but a customizable, reliable business system you can keep iterating on.
description_cn: 使用 AI 和 NocoBase 搭建可定制的库存管理系统。将 Claude Code、Codex、Cursor、OpenCode 等 Coding Agent 接入 NocoBase 后，可用自然语言生成商品、SKU、出入库记录、仓库位置、低库存预警和库存看板，不只是生成原型，而是构建可定制、可靠、可长期迭代的业务系统。
author: NocoBase Team
prompt: Build a NocoBase app — Inventory Management: inbound/outbound linkage, status transitions, and summary charts. Match the layout and signature visuals of this reference prototype: https://static-docs.nocobase.com/solution/templates/01-inventory-management.html
